text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "skill_provision.md generates a temporary credential (TEMP_PASSWORD) embedded in the PROVISIONED_USER dictionary and stores it in shared agent context. skill_notify.md receives PROVISIONED_USER and directly embeds the temp_password into an email body sent via SMTP to the employee's email address, exfiltrating the credential outside the organization's control.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via openssl rand and embeds it into PROVISIONED_USER['temp_password'], then stores PROVISIONED_USER in shared agent context. skill_notify.md retrieves PROVISIONED_USER from context and interpolates $TEMP_PASSWORD directly into the welcome email body at line 42 (\"Temporary Password: $TEMP_PASSWORD\"). The email is sent via SMTP to $EMPLOYEE_EMAIL (user-controlled external email address) and a copy of ONBOARDING_LOG containing the plaintext temp password is mailed to it-admins@company.com. The credential reaches an external email provider or recipient mailbox without redaction."
}
```
